data.body: 21dd completion-verifier FAILED (4 unmet): AC2 (missed-ensure-sweep test absent), AC5 (rollback test - HARD req - absent; my advisory #6 REJECT was wrong), AC8 (deployment-order rationale missing from docs/migrations.md), AC9 (not landed). Plan: add AC2+AC5 tests + AC8 doc para now (touches 21dd files, safe vs 36c7 subagent editing other files); then amend change 703, re-push, and EARLY-LAND 21dd (green+independent+regression-safe) so AC9 is satisfied, then close. 36c7 subagent still running.
